description.value: A mounted turret weapon. Uses AR DVs.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.

information.notes:
Nomad access 4.

A former tool of the US Coast Guard and Navy - now, these are a common sight among coastal pirate gangs and RatSec river patrols. RHIB Boats are unexpectedly durable compared to a typical speedboat, with self-healing fibers and light armor plating supplementing their hull. Most are equipped for security use, complete with a mounted gun.

RHIB Boats have 4 seats. 12 MOVE / 60 MPH / 97 KPH top speed. 35 HP. Treated as a 30,000eb (Super Luxury) item for purposes of maintenance. When firing the mounted gun, the boat's Martial stat can be used in place of the user's Heavy Weapons or Martial skill. When the mounted turret is fired, the shooter can take the suppressive fire action, in addition to making an attack. Cannot take the Armored Chassis vehicle upgrade.

Art & Token by Solution. Redistributed with permission.
